name: mts.gov.eg
message: [AI generated] "mts.gov.eg" is the website for the Ministry of Transport in Egypt, a government agency that oversees the implementation of public transport policies and infrastructure development. The Ministry maintains roads, bridges, ports, railway networks, and airports throughout Egypt, optimizing transportation for the benefit of both individuals and goods. This platform provides the latest updates, services, and important information related to transportation in the region.
